pytorch.reason: torch.linalg.eigvalsh on Cl(3,0) Dirac tensor — load-bearing eigenvalue computation

pyg.reason: not load-bearing for spectral triple; graph structure handled by rustworkx and xgi

z3.reason: z3 SAT/UNSAT proof guard for mass-shell constraint admissibility — primary exclusion mechanism

cvc5.reason: z3 sufficient for mass-shell SMT queries; cvc5 redundant on scalar real arithmetic

sympy.reason: symbolic exact eigenvalue computation for minimal Dirac chiral block

clifford.reason: Cl(3,0) algebra construction and Dirac operator assembly from gamma blades

geomstats.reason: eigenvalue geometry is Clifford-native; geomstats not needed for this scalar spectrum

e3nn.reason: equivariant features not required; Dirac spectrum symmetry verified via torch eigvalsh

rustworkx.reason: DiGraph encodes spectral proximity relations between eigenvalue candidates

xgi.reason: xgi hypergraph encodes constraint set shared across multiple eigenvalue candidates

toponetx.reason: CellComplex encodes oriented eigenvalue pair topology for spectral triple

gudhi.reason: Rips complex on eigenvalue point cloud probes spectral topology persistence

P1_dirac_eigenvalues_real_symmetric.note: Cl(3,0) Dirac operator real symmetric part survives eigenvalue symmetry probe

P2_z3_mass_shell_admissible.note: sqrt(3) eigenvalue survives z3 mass-shell constraint probe

P3_sympy_exact_eigenvalues.note: sympy yields exactly ±m as constraint-admissible eigenvalues

P4_rustworkx_eigenvalue_graph.note: rustworkx DiGraph correctly indexes 2 eigenvalue nodes

N1_z3_excludes_offshell_eigenvalue.note: z3 correctly excluded lambda=2.0 as off-shell — UNSAT proof confirms exclusion

N2_z3_excludes_complex_offshell.note: complex eigenvalue 1+i excluded by z3 — |1+i|^2=2 violates mass-shell constraint

N3_antihermitian_perturbation_excluded.note: actual Cl(3,0) Dirac is self-adjoint (survives); i*I perturbation is excluded from spectral triple

B1_zero_eigenvalue_excluded.note: lambda=0 excluded by z3 from mass_sq=3 spectral triple — massless not admissible here

B2_massless_admits_zero.note: lambda=0 survives z3 probe for massless spectral triple — constraint-admissible boundary case

B3_toponetx_eigenvalue_cell_complex.note: TopoNetX CellComplex encodes oriented eigenvalue pairs as 1-cells

B4_gudhi_rips_eigenvalue_cloud.note: gudhi Rips complex on eigenvalue point cloud — ±sqrt(3) connected within max_edge_length

B5_xgi_constraint_hypergraph.note: xgi hypergraph encodes mass-shell constraint as a shared hyperedge over eigenvalue nodes
